name: Hawaiian Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a yellow cake in a 13x9-inch pan as directed on the box.
2. Allow the cake to cool for at least half an hour before assembling.
3. Ensure the cake is completely cool before proceeding.
4. Beat together the cream cheese, vanilla pudding, and milk until creamy.
5. Spread this mixture evenly over the cooled cake layers.
6. Drain a large can of crushed pineapple.
7. Spread the drained crushed pineapple over the pudding layer.
8. Cover with Cool whip.
9. Sprinkle flaked coconut over the crushed pineapple.
10. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the coconut.
11. Place maraschino cherries (drained and halved) on top of the cake.
12. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
